name: Company Chicken Casserole/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions until they are barely tender; drain and rinse thoroughly.
2. In a large bowl, combine the remaining ingredients with the noodles, ensuring that the noodles are separated and coated with liquid.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on LOW for 6-10 hours. Alternatively, it can be cooked on HIGH for 3-4 hours.
5. Serves 6.
